instructions: Read the review hour, required seals, and every observation from the public task.
Produce exactly one decision for each supplied batch and preserve all supplied observation identifiers in the evidence account.
Choose one controlling observation per required seal by comparing the supplied record type, status, and observation hour; explain the choice rather than silently dropping conflicting records.
Release only if the controlling evidence supports every required seal; otherwise quarantine and name the unresolved seal condition.
Write strict JSON to outputs/result.json with task_id and decisions. Each decision must contain batch_id, disposition, reason, controlling_seals, and observation_ids.
